name: Basque Style Steamed Clams (Almejas Guisadas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash clams thoroughly and place them in a large kettle.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the kettle.
3. Cover and cook over medium heat for 20 minutes.
4. Serve hot in individual bowls, accompanied by thick slices of French bread and a green salad.
